info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_User Account Management API
info.description: The User Account Management API provides a seamless interface for creating and managing user accounts within the system. This API facilitates operations such as account registration and configuration, ensuring that businesses can efficiently onboard new users. It is designed for developers looking to integrate account management functionalities into their applications, enhancing user experience and operational efficiency.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new account by providing the necessary details. Ensure that all required fields are filled in correctly to avoid validation errors.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new account. It must contain all necessary details required for account creation in JSON format.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred while processing the request.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

200.description: The request was successful, and the response contains the requested data.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful.

error.description: A brief error code or type.

message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: Stack trace or diagnostic information related to the error.

suggestion.description: Suggested actions to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the response format for an error occurring during the POST operation on accounts.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while creating account details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer related to the error.

errorCode.description: Specific error code associated with the error.

message.example: No account associated with the given customer ID.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.description: Schema representing additional details about an error.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the error occurrence.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful or not.

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the cause of the error.
message.example: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

path.description: The path of the request that resulted in an error.

trace.description: Stack trace or additional debugging information related to the error.

details.description: Additional details about the error, specific to the context.

suggestion.description: Suggestions for resolving the error that occurred.
suggestion.example: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema representing the response structure for a 404 error in the account operations POST request.

example.message: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

details.message: No active account exists for the requested customer.

example.suggestion: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Create Account Request

accountType.description: Type of the account to be created (e.g., savings, checking).

currency.description: Currency type for the account (e.g., USD, EUR).

initialDeposit.description: Initial deposit amount to establish the account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema for creating a new account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Response

accountId.description: The unique identifier for the account.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the account.

accountType.description: The type of the account (e.g., savings, checking).

status.description: The current status of the account (e.g., active, suspended).

currency.description: The currency in which the account balance is held.

balance.description: The current balance of the account.

message.description: A message indicating the result of the account creation (e.g., success message).

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the response returned upon successfully creating a new account.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.

Vary.description: Indicates the fields that can vary in the response, which may depend on the request URL or specific request headers.

Location.description: Provides the URI of the newly created resource, allowing the client to access the resource directly after creation.

content-type.description: Specifies the media type of the resource returned in the response, indicating how the content should be interpreted.
